stemHtml: The first stage of Fowler Flap deployment mostly increases (1) _____ which will (2) _____.

options.a: (1) the chord; (2) increase the lift generated for the same speed
options.b: (1) the camber; (2) increase the lift generated for the same speed
options.c: (1) the chord; (2) increase drag more than lift
options.d: (1) the camber; (2) increase drag more than lift
